characters.description: Mayor PlagaGenderMaleCharacter typeNeutralAppearancesMost episodesEnemiesBarbara Blabber Mayor Plagais the mayor ofMegalopolis Plaga is the overweight mayor of Megalopolis and a typical self-centered politician. He isn't very competent but he cares about his city.
